title: 01 — Domain Model
summary: Business domain model for SISKONKIN: Kontrak Kinerja hierarchy, perspectives/weights, KPI vs Maturity Level indicator types, and compliance rules for PT PLN Nusantara Power generating units.
scope: Sub-indikator BPP, SDGs, HCR, OCR, SMAP
Stream maturity (Outage, Reliability, WPC, Operation, Efficiency, LCCM, DPP, SCM, etc.)
